description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a sleek, dark-colored chassis and a large, high-resolution display. The screen is open and shows a vivid image of a person, suggesting the device is powered on and in use. The keyboard is full-sized with a standard QWERTY layout, featuring a prominent trackpad below the keys. The exterior surfaces are smooth and matte, with no visible brand logos or stickers on the lid or palm rest. The laptop appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. No external ports or connectors are visible from the provided views.
description: A sleek, dark-colored modern laptop with a large display, full keyboard, and smooth matte finish. The screen is on, showing a vivid image, and no logos or stickers are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen displaying an image, full keyboard, and trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and open screen; no ports or connectors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unmarked back of the laptop lid.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the slim design and open screen.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying an image of a person with visible application interface.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad, standard laptop configuration.
